title: Green Thumb Industries Inc. (GTBIF) Analyst Ratings, Estimates & Forecasts
text: Yahoo Finance provides comprehensive analyst ratings, estimates, and forecasts for Green Thumb Industries (GTBIF). The consensus among analysts is strongly bullish on the stock. Earnings estimates project continued growth in revenue and profitability through 2024 and 2025. The company's current valuation metrics reflect expectations for strong earnings growth. Multiple analysts have initiated or reiterated buy ratings on the stock based on fundamental strength and growth prospects. The average price target implies significant upside potential from current trading levels. Key drivers of analyst bullish sentiment include the company's profitability in a competitive industry, positive cash flow generation, and potential upside from federal legalization or rescheduling. The company's market leadership position and operational efficiency set it apart from competitors. Recent earnings beats and strong guidance support analyst confidence in management execution. The improving debt profile following refinancing also supports analyst optimism regarding the stock's outlook.
